title: A Minecraft Movie Discs
description: A mod adding music discs of the music from A Minecraft Movie, this features Steve's Lava Chicken, Ode to Dennis and more
body:
This mods adds 11 new music discs featuring some of the best songs from the movie. These can be crafted using [Disc Recipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/disc-recipes).

![Movie Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RHRH4qte/images/8217876ecb89003de51d07e2feb206506708d426.png)

## Movie Discs
- Minecraft
- I Feel Alive
- Magical Mystery Tour
- Zero to Hero
- Steve's Lava Chicken
- Steve's Lava Chicken Extended
- Birthday Rap
- Birthday Rap Extended
- Ode to Dennis
- Ode to Dennis Extended
- Welcome to Steve's

## New Advancements
As well as discs there are also 2 advancements for collecting all 11 discs.

![New Advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RHRH4qte/images/a463519284a48326ab93a159e703db3952a64216.png)

For any suggestions contact me on Discord @thecatking01
